title: Checkbox
description: Binary or multi-select choice. Prefer native <input type="checkbox"> for semantics and keyboard support.

props.name: checked
props.description: Current checked state (controlled/uncontrolled depends on framework).

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Mixed state for hierarchical selections (visual only; manage separately from checked).

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required in a form.

states.name: checked
effects: Show checkmark; maintain sufficient contrast in both themes.

states.name: indeterminate
effects: Show dash; do not imply fully checked.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

keyboard: Space toggles checked state when focused (native checkbox behavior).
Tab focuses the checkbox; Shift+Tab reverses.
aria: If indeterminate, set the DOM property input.indeterminate=true (not only aria).
If you cannot use native input, mirror semantics using role="checkbox" and aria-checked.

must: Label must be programmatically associated with the checkbox.
should: Clickable label increases hit area and improves usability.
must_not: Do not use checkbox for mutually exclusive choices (use radio group).

token_usage.notes: Default border; on focus use semantic.color.border.focus.
Use consistent radius for form controls.
